originalTitle: Amazon’s search bar will invent AI-generated products you can’t buy
summary: Amazon's updated search bar will now show you AI-generated images of products as you describe them. For now, the in-app feature only surfaces AI images of clothing and home goods, allowing you to tap on the image that best matches what you're looking for and search for similar-looking items. In a blog post, Amazon positions […]
content: Amazon’s updated search bar will now show you AI-generated images of products as you describe them. For now, the in-app feature only surfaces AI images of clothing and home goods, allowing you to tap on the image that best matches what you’re looking for and search for similar-looking items. In a blog post, Amazon positions the feature as a way to help you  search for items if you can’t remember the name of a specific texture or style, like describing a “shirt with a draped collar” if you can’t think of “cowl neck.” The feature seems like it might come in handy in these kinds of scenarios, but it doesn’t really add much if you’re just searching for something simple, like a “blue t-shirt.” [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/si3-pr-post-alt-v1-4mb-2.gif?quality=90&strip=all] Google launched a similar feature in AI Mode last year, which generates images of fake outfits and decorations to help you find real-life lookalike products. Meanwhile, online retailers are teaming up with Gemini and ChatGPT as AI becomes even more embedded in shopping. Amazon isn’t using AI to generate fake products for its other “shop by style” feature, though. This feature will show AI-generated collages with the clothing item you’re searching for. [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/shop-by-style-inline-blue.png?quality=90&strip=all] If you’re looking for denim shorts, for example, Amazon will show a carousel of suggested outfits with denim shorts. Though the outfits are AI-generated, the clothing in them isn’t, which means you can purchase the pictured items. These features are coming to Amazon’s app on Android and iOS.
chineseTitle: 亚马逊的搜索栏将发明 AI 生成的你买不到的产品
chineseSummary: 亚马逊更新的搜索栏现在将向您显示人工智能生成的产品图像，正如您所描述的那样。目前，应用内功能仅显示服装和家居用品的人工智能图像，允许您点击与您要查找的内容最匹配的图像并搜索外观相似的物品。在一篇博文中，亚马逊表示 [...]
chineseContent: 亚马逊更新的搜索栏现在将向您显示人工智能生成的产品图像，正如您所描述的那样。目前，应用内功能仅显示服装和家居用品的人工智能图像，允许您点击与您要查找的内容最匹配的图像并搜索外观相似的物品。在一篇博文中，亚马逊将该功能定位为一种在您记不住特定纹理或款式的名称时帮助您搜索商品的方式，就像在您想不起“翻领”时描述“带有垂褶领的衬衫”一样。该功能似乎在此类场景中会派上用场，但如果您只是寻找简单的东西（例如“蓝色 T 恤”），那么它并没有真正增加太多功能。 [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/si3-pr-post-alt-v1-4mb-2.gif?quality=90&strip=all]谷歌去年在AI模式中推出了类似的功能，该功能可以生成假服装和装饰品的图像，以帮助您找到与现实生活中相似的产品。与此同时，随着人工智能更加深入地融入购物中，在线零售商正在与 Gemini 和 ChatGPT 合作。不过，亚马逊并没有使用人工智能为其其他“按风格购物”功能生成假货。此功能将显示人工智能生成的拼贴画以及您正在搜索的服装。 [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/shop-by-style-inline-blue.png?quality=90&strip=all] 例如，如果您正在寻找牛仔短裤，亚马逊将显示一个带有牛仔短裤的建议服装轮播。虽然这些服装是人工智能生成的，但其中的衣服不是人工智能生成的，这意味着你可以购买图中的物品。这些功能将出现在 Android 和 iOS 版亚马逊应用程序中。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
